name: okf-knowledge-vault
description: OKF Knowledge Vault deterministic helper CLI

scripts.format:check: prettier --check src test schemas .agents/skills/okf-knowledge-vault package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.test.json eslint.config.js .prettierrc.json
scripts.test: pnpm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test dist-test/*.test.js dist-test/**/*.test.js test/contracts/*.test.mjs test/workflows/*.test.mjs
